alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with scaling of global commercial operations and transformation programs; experience with transformation programs and commercial operations scaling suggests portfolio and multi-stakeholder management capability
alignments.job_requirement: Verantwortung für vertragliche und kommerzielle Geschäftsbeziehung eines Portfolios von Partner-Busunternehmen

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations leader with ownership and stakeholder management experience; however, no specific evidence of contract negotiation or vendor/partner management in the provided profile
alignments.job_requirement: Zentrale Ansprechperson für die Geschäftsführung unserer Buspartner inkl. Vertragsverhandlungen

alignments.candidate_evidence: Experience as cross-functional orchestrator in transformation programs and global commercial operations suggests internal coordination and project steering capability
alignments.job_requirement: Schnittstelle zwischen Buspartnern und internen Abteilungen zur Steuerung von Projekten und Abstimmungsprozessen

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations background implies analytics capability; honest gap notes limited specific evidence of financial/cost analysis work
alignments.job_requirement: Erstellung von Entscheidungsvorlagen auf Basis von Kosten- und Performanceanalysen

alignments.candidate_evidence: Transformation program leadership experience and eight-year career at Google Devices indicate project ownership and delivery discipline
alignments.job_requirement: Leitung kleinerer Projekte von der Konzeption bis zum Abschluss; Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Zielen, Timelines und Budgets

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations profile indicates analytical capability; no specific Excel or technical proficiency mentioned
alignments.job_requirement: Ausgeprä​gte analytische Fähigkeiten und sehr gute Excel-Kenntnisse; Erfahrung im Projektmanagement

gaps.gap: No direct partner/vendor management, contract negotiation, or commercial partnership experience mentioned; role centers heavily on bus operator partner relationships
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's cross-functional orchestration, negotiation readiness, and stakeholder management from Google scale-up work could transfer; Flix role spans from partner ops to commercial strategy, where ops discipline applies broadly

gaps.gap: Transportation, logistics, or bus industry domain expertise absent; JD lists 'Verkehrswesen' or equivalent transport sector background as preferred
gaps.mitigation: Flix's JD acknowledges candidates without perfect fit ('auch wenn du nicht alle Anforderungen zu 100% erfüllst'); strong operations fundamentals and learning agility can bridge domain

gaps.gap: No explicit financial analysis, cost modeling, or P&L responsibility mentioned; role requires cost/performance analysis and budget tracking
gaps.mitigation: Strategy and Operations roles typically include metric and performance ownership; candidate's transformation program background likely involved budgeting and cost optimization

gaps.gap: Limited evidence of independent hands-on project leadership at comparable scope; 'kleine Projekte' (small projects) leadership may underestimate or overestimate candidate seniority
gaps.mitigation: Eight-year career with two promotions and global program experience suggests project leadership capability; Flix is mid-market SaaS, not Google scale

output.summary: This is a Partner Manager role at Flix (Business Development, DACH-focused) requiring contract negotiation, partner portfolio management, and cost/performance analysis in the bus operator space. Candidate is a Google-trained Strat & Ops leader with eight years, global transformation, and stakeholder management experience, but lacks direct vendor/partner management, transportation domain expertise, and explicit contract/financial analysis evidence. Cross-functional orchestration and operational discipline are transferable; domain and partnership gap are material and not easily covered by operational background alone.
uncertainties: Candidate's 'commercial operations scaling' at Google Devices is not detailed; unclear whether it included vendor/partner management, pricing, or cost optimization
No information on candidate's location flexibility or German language proficiency level; JD requires 'verhandlungssicheres Deutsch' and is Berlin-based hybrid
Partner vs. customer management scope undefined; unclear if candidate has account management or vendor relationship experience at Google
Transformation program nature unknown; unclear if programs involved cost models, procurement, logistics, or partner coordination
